Dear friends,

We�re very pleased to introduce Client Startup Kit: First Three Sessions. This is a bonus training on how, as a beginner coach, you can use simple strategies to generate powerful changes for your clients.

As opposed to the Tony interventions, which take place on stage with an audience, this teaching series focuses on phone coaching � how to connect with, understand, and transform someone using the phone as your instrument of change. You�ll get:
Three Narrated phone sessions

The interventions are real recorded phone sessions. The interventionist will be Magali Peysha, who is my wife and coaching partner, as well as Vice-President and Cofounder of Robbins-Madanes Training. I (Mark) will be narrating the intervention for you, much as we do for the Tony intervention films. As in the films, you get the opportunity to perceive real change as it takes place, and you�ll have the strategies narrated as you listen.
Three Worksheets

Each of the three interventions comes with a worksheet for each session so that you can track your discoveries in the session and your progress as a coach.
